evidence: I have several of this couple's dvds and try to do this one weekly in the rotation.
I have three of their yoga videos and enjoy all very much.

summary: The user has a strong preference for yoga, particularly Kundalini and Bryan Kest styles, indicating a focus on moderate physical engagement rather than high-intensity workouts. They tend to favor simpler, slower-paced routines and show a low sensitivity to production quality, suggesting they prioritize the exercise experience over entertainment value.
